Variables.Name: Texture
Variables.Description: The texture from which to create the vector field.

Variables.Name: ConstructionOp
Variables.Description: The operation used to construct the vector field.

Variables.Name: VolumeSizeX
Variables.Description: The size of the volume. Valid sizes: 16, 32, 64.

Variables.Name: VolumeSizeY
Variables.Description: The size of the volume. Valid sizes: 16, 32, 64.

Variables.Name: VolumeSizeZ
Variables.Description: The size of the volume. Valid sizes: 16, 32, 64.

Variables.Name: SubImagesX
Variables.Description: The number of horizontal subimages in the texture atlas.

Variables.Name: SubImagesY
Variables.Description: The number of vertical subimages in the texture atlas.

Variables.Name: FrameCount
Variables.Description: The number of frames in the atlas.

Variables.Name: FramesPerSecond
Variables.Description: The rate at which to interpolate between frames.

Variables.Name: bLoop
Variables.Description: Whether or not the simulation should loop.

Variables.Name: NoiseField
Variables.Description: A static vector field used to add noise.

Variables.Name: NoiseScale
Variables.Description: Scale to apply to vectors in the noise field.

Variables.Name: NoiseMax
Variables.Description: The maximum magnitude of noise vectors to apply.
